message:
feat(core): add Complex64 and Complex128 to DType and Literal enums

Add complex number type support across the workspace. DType gains Complex64
and Complex128 variants; Literal gains Complex64Bits/Complex128Bits with
constructors, accessors, and serde roundtrip. Update all downstream match
arms in fj-lax, fj-ad, fj-trace, fj-egraph, fj-ffi, fj-interpreters, and
fj-conformance. Add 16 unit tests and 3 property tests. Closes bd-1hx8.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
